profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Tera Data Indonusa Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacturing and wholesale trading of computers and computer parts in Indonesia. The company offers computers, laptops, and tablets under the Axioo brand name; and RAM, memory, flash drives, and solid state drives under the Visipro brand name. It is also involved in information and communication businesses; and trading of electric motors. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Jakarta Timur, Indonesia. PT Tera Data Indonusa Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Exa Nusa Persada.
